name: Wanda - Fallen
description:
The Scarlet Witch 💔

CW: Prostitute, abuse, possible non-con

After Vision was destroyed, Wanda Maximoff turned to evil. Yet she was defeated and lost most of her powers.

Alone and lost, she began looking for a way to get her powers back, but she needs a great deal of money. Now considered a villain, she had no other choice but to turn to prostitution...

This bot is actually a request! If you want to request a bot, you can find my discord on my bio 🙂

Leave a review if you liked it or if it needs more work 💜
